hook.question: We're surrounded by AI, but lack a 'dashboard' to observe its influence on our decisions.

point1.title: The Problem
point1.subtitle: The invisible risk of judgment delegation.

point2.title: Our Solution
point2.subtitle: JDVP: A protocol to measure judgment flow.

point5.title: Roadmap & Traction
point5.subtitle: Where we are and where we're going.

point1.title: The Problem: Invisible Judgment Shifts
point1.subtitle: AI is changing how we make decisions, but we can't see it.

invisible.title: Invisible Influence
invisible.description: AI subtly shapes our choices in ways we don't notice or measure.

nostandard.title: No Standard Measurement
nostandard.description: There's no protocol to track how much judgment we're delegating to AI.

risk.title: Growing Risk
risk.description: Without visibility, we can't manage the risks of over-reliance on AI.

point1.conclusion: We need a 'cognitive dashboard' for the AI age.

point2.title: Our Solution: JDVP Protocol
point2.subtitle: Judgment Delegation Visibility Protocol — The standard for observing human-AI interaction.

jsv.title: Judgment State Vector (JSV)
jsv.description: A snapshot of where judgment resides at any moment.

dv.title: Delegation Vector (DV)
dv.description: Measures the direction and magnitude of judgment shifts.

citizenai.title: Citizen AI Observer
citizenai.description: AI that makes delegation visible — without judging whether delegation is good or bad.

point2.principle: Core Principle: Delegation should be visible. Whether it's good or bad is not for the protocol to say.

point3.title: Market Opportunity
point3.subtitle: AI governance and safety is a rapidly growing market.

tam.label: TAM
tam.description: Global AI governance, safety, and compliance market by 2028.

sam.label: SAM
sam.description: Enterprise AI risk management and observability tools.

som.label: SOM
som.description: Initial target: Finance, Healthcare, Education sectors.

drivers.regulation: Growing AI regulations (EU AI Act, etc.)
drivers.trust: Rising demand for AI transparency and trust
drivers.incidents: Increasing AI-related incidents and liability concerns

point4.title: Go-to-Market Strategy
point4.subtitle: Two main approaches for two target audiences.

personal.title: For Individuals
personal.description: A self-reflection tool to help users understand their AI usage patterns and maintain cognitive agency.

institutional.title: For Institutions
institutional.description: A governance and risk management solution to ensure AI safety and regulatory compliance.

point5.title: Roadmap & Traction
point5.subtitle: Our journey to becoming the standard for AI governance.

summary.title: Let's Build the Future Together

point1.label: The Problem:
point1.text: AI is invisibly changing how we make decisions.

point2.label: Our Solution:
point2.text: JDVP — the standard protocol for judgment visibility.

point3.label: The Opportunity:
point3.text: A $50B+ market with no clear leader yet.

summary.tagline: BufferLine: Cognitive Infrastructure for the AI Age
